cases.disclosure: The source-controlled harness injected one transient disconnect at the production owner-local phase dispatch boundary, retried the exact operation, completed the real local composition, and then verified cleanup. This was an injected fault, not an external outage.

The production owner-local composition does not have a source-controlled coordinator_crash injection seam. This case did not run and does not contribute acceptance evidence.

A source-controlled fault hook raised an exception after the production custody store removed ciphertext and before closeout. A new store object resumed the durable delete intent and verified absence. This was not an external process death.
The production owner-local composition does not have a source-controlled provider_crash injection seam. This case did not run and does not contribute acceptance evidence.

The source-controlled harness replayed identical stage and activation calls at the production owner-local destination lifecycle. The replay returned the same reservation and receipt, did not run a second stage writer or start a second helper, and then completed failback and teardown. This was not an external network event.

The source-controlled harness called production owner-local activation before stage. The lifecycle rejected it as conflicting_replay without an operation, reservation, helper, stage writer, or authority change. The normal stage, activation, failback, and teardown then completed. This was not an external network event.

After the real owner-local move activated generation 2, the source-controlled harness submitted a generation 1 operation to the production durable ledger. The ledger rejected it as stale_generation, and the full composition continued through failback and teardown.
The production owner-local composition does not have a source-controlled lease_expiry_clock_skew injection seam. This case did not run and does not contribute acceptance evidence.

The source-controlled harness injected one cleanup refusal at the production owner-local lifecycle boundary. The exact durable cleanup operation retried, completed, and later passed the full-composition residue checks. This was not an external authority refusal.

After the real owner-local destination staged attachment B at generation 2, the source-controlled harness submitted a competing attachment claim for the same generation while generation 1 remained the current quiesced source. The production durable ledger rejected the claim as conflicting_replay, and the full composition continued through activation, failback, and teardown.
The production owner-local composition does not have a source-controlled target_offline_or_evicted injection seam. This case did not run and does not contribute acceptance evidence.
The production owner-local composition does not have a source-controlled cancellation_and_app_restart injection seam. This case did not run and does not contribute acceptance evidence.
The production owner-local composition does not have a source-controlled failback_to_older_recovery_point injection seam. This case did not run and does not contribute acceptance evidence.
